creator: piotr_sawicki@yahoo.com
text:
Hi) the problems lies somewhere ins packages 
xorg-server-1.20.7_2,1
xf86-input-mouse-1.9.3_3
xf86-input-keyboard-1.9.0_4

using the old ports tree i recompiled everything from ports ( by poudriere ) paying special attention to note in ports UPDATING 
20200220:
  AFFECTS: users of x11-servers/xorg-server

  With this update, xorg-server has switched from using the devd backend to
  the udev backend for device configuration on FreeBSD 12 and 13.  If you have
  issues with input devices, please see the install message for details.

With UDEV or DEVD - it doesn not work 
appears) to  be frozen 
But the x11vnc server which grabs input mouse&keyboard works without any problems

I notices also one crash but dont know whats the reason for thats

Now with the old source compiled packages
xorg-server-1.18.4_13,1
xf86-input-keyboard-1.9.0_3
xf86-input-mouse-1.9.3_2

so far desktop works without any problems ( no crash i hope)

graphics - radeon

drm-fbsd12.0-kmod-4.16.g20200221
libdrm-2.4.99,1

$ kldstat

13    1 0xffffffff82937000   151620 radeonkms.ko

19    1 0xffffffff82b33000     12f9 radeon_REDWOOD_pfp_bin.ko
20    1 0xffffffff82b35000     16f7 radeon_REDWOOD_me_bin.ko
21    1 0xffffffff82b37000      d79 radeon_REDWOOD_rlc_bin.ko
22    1 0xffffffff82b38000     6089 radeon_REDWOOD_smc_bin.ko
23    1 0xffffffff82b3f000    1c599 radeon_CYPRESS_uvd_bin.ko


If i can help - please give me a notice 
i'm alone not able to debug farther 
a bit sad the problem was noticed only by me 
and no one helped solving 
Pretty sure must be the case in other installation too

regards piotr sawicki
